case_title: BRICKER, STEVE M VS GANUELAS, ANTONIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRICKER, STEVE M AS TO DEFENDANT GANUELAS, ANTONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
